message:
fix(bitmap): use Redis-accurate error messages for GETBIT and BITPOS

- GETBIT: "ERR bit offset is not an integer or out of range" (was generic)
- BITPOS: "ERR The bit argument must be 1 or 0." for invalid bit value
  (was generic "ERR value is not an integer or out of range")
- Updated core_errors fixture to match new GETBIT error message

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
